title: Totem of Homing
description: Use a Totem of Homing to truly cheat death
body:
想限制利用死亡不掉落快速回城的游戏高手，又不想游戏菜鸟因为彻底关闭死亡不掉落导致物品丢失而哭泣？又希望有一定的平衡性？
快来使用归家图腾！让你享受回家的乐趣。
This project provides a balanced alternative to the “keep inventory on death” mechanic. Instead of fully preventing item loss or allowing abuse, it introduces a simple rule: when a player dies, a Totem of Undying is consumed and the player returns to their spawn point.

It helps prevent experienced players from exploiting instant returns, while still protecting beginners from losing all their items.
